## Source: kam193 (155862095ddb7d3410298aef76abdda3e7eeaf5609b72f97c30790c317b8d1cb)
During installation, the package exfiltrates env variables and data from different process memory to  a remote location


---

Category: MALICIOUS - The campaign has clearly malicious intent, like infostealers.


Campaign: 2026-01-do-not-install-this-package-002


Reasons (based on the campaign):


 - exfiltration-generic


 - exfiltration-credentials


 - exfiltration-env-variables


 - The package overrides the install command in setup.py to execute malicious code during installation.
